description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Evennia test-suite and coveralls that runs on every push to master and develop branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.7 and 3.8 and databases sqlite3, postgresql, and mysql. For each matrix combination, set up the database, install Python dependencies, initialize Evennia, run tests with coverage, and send data to Coveralls and Codacy for specific combinations.
